title: Mermin
description: The Mermin / Belinskii-Klyshko benchmark schema. Tests the multipartite Mermin-Klyshko polynomial M_N on connected N-vertex paths of the device coupling graph for N in [min_n, max_n].

benchmark_name.description: Name of the benchmark. Must be 'Mermin' for this schema.

shots.description: Number of measurement shots per circuit.

min_n.description: Smallest N for which to evaluate M_N. Must be >= 2 (N=2 recovers CHSH).

max_n.description: Largest N for which to evaluate M_N. Sweep stops early if no connected path of length N exists on the device coupling graph.
